channel.title: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.315.0.WPBCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China

Codename: popsicle

Version: OS3.0.315.0.WPBCNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.2 GB

MD5: ef8a946f5d0da2d8c5d20630b243904e

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Memory management for improved system smoothness
Fix: Background processes could start unexpectedly in some scenarios
Fix: High refresh rate didn't work in some third party apps
Fix: PDF documents weren't fully displayed in some cases
[Rear display]
New: When the front screen is unlocked, the rear display now turns off automatically to help extend battery life

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.315.0.WPBCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max China

Codename: popsicle

Version: OS3.0.315.0.WPBCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.7 GB

MD5: a1c9988f36b614e4ac1e0d7ad90bb609

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Memory management for improved system smoothness
Fix: Background processes could start unexpectedly in some scenarios
Fix: High refresh rate didn't work in some third party apps
Fix: PDF documents weren't fully displayed in some cases
[Rear display]
New: When the front screen is unlocked, the rear display now turns off automatically to help extend battery life

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here
